# LWW Textbook Hub
> https://brightlane.github.io/Lww-Textbook-Hubs

LWW nursing and medical textbook reviews and affiliate deals. Nursing Drug Handbook, BRS, Illustrated Reviews, NCLEX and USMLE prep books. LinkConnector affiliate lc=014538024578003224.

Updated: 2026-06-04
Brand: LWW Textbook Hub

## Affiliate
- Merchant: LWW (Lippincott Williams & Wilkins / Wolters Kluwer)
- Network: LinkConnector
- ID: lc=014538024578003224
- atid: ShopLWW-Web
- lcpt: 0
- lcpf: 0
- URL: https://www.linkconnector.com/ta.php?lc=014538024578003224&atid=ShopLWW-Web&lcpt=0&lcpf=0

## Key Books
- Nursing Drug Handbook ($49.99) — 4,500+ drugs, nursing-specific
- Lippincott Pocket Drug Guide ($39.99) — 3,500 drugs, clinical portable
- BRS Physiology ($45.99) — USMLE Step 1 physiology review
- Illustrated Reviews: Pharmacology ($39.99) — visual pharmacology
- Lippincott Q&A Review for NCLEX ($44.99) — practice questions
- BRS Behavioral Science ($43.99) — USMLE Step 1 behavioral
